name: @borjie/role-aware-advisor
description: Role-aware universal real-estate advisor. Composes the existing advisor packages (sustainability, expansion, acquisition, lifecycle, green-angle, estate-department, estate-auto-management) plus brain-direct intents (lease, maintenance, market, neighborhood) into a single role-shaped front door. Capability-matrix data guard prevents cross-tenant leaks; persona shapes per-role tone + depth; intelligent starting points surface relevant questions per user RIGHT NOW; audit trail every ask + answer to a worm store. Pure functions + injectable ports — caller wires brain/data/audit.
